name: Marinated Baby Corn Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine oil, lemon juice, soy sauce, garlic, onion salt, pepper, parsley and oregano.
2. Fold in the baby corn.
3. Cover and refrigerate.
4. To serve, arrange salad greens on plates or in bowls.
5. Top with baby corn.
6. Spoon remaining dressing over greens.
